description: CSS background-image: url() on blocks — cover/no-repeat, positioned badge over a backdrop color, and an explicitly-sized tiled panel.
visual_assertions: Three bordered panels below an h1 heading.
The first panel is fully covered by the image (scaled to cover, aspect preserved, no tiling).
The second panel shows a single image anchored to its top-right corner over a pale blue backdrop color.
The third panel tiles the image at 16pt across its whole area, clipped to the panel.
